name: Suspicious AppX Package Locations
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious AppX Package Locations
SIGMA Description: Detects an appx package added the pipeline of the "to be processed" packages which is located in suspicious locations

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=854 AND (LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\users\public\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%/users/public/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\perflogs\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:/perflogs/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%\desktop\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%/desktop/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%\downloads\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%/downloads/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\windows\temp\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:/windows/temp/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%\appddata\local\temp\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%/appddata/local/temp/%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious AppX Package Locations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=854 AND (LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\users\public\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%/users/public/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\perflogs\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:/perflogs/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%\desktop\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%/desktop/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%\downloads\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%/downloads/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:\windows\temp\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%c:/windows/temp/%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%\appddata\local\temp\%' OR LOWER("File Path") LIKE '%/appddata/local/temp/%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious AppX Package Locations
